headline: Merck (NYSE:MRK) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Global pharmaceutical company Merck (NYSE:MRK) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 4.9% year on year to $16.29 billion. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $66.4 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP loss of $1.28 per share was 13.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
